zh.Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Englan: 英國爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可
zh.Brereton, Cheshire, Eng: 英國英格蘭爾布雷雷頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Bosley於大約1290年出生在英國爾波斯利時，她的父親Sir Richard Bosley28歲，母親Lady Jane Pulford23歲。她於1318年與William Brereton在英國爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1360年在英國英格蘭爾保斯托享年71歲。

zh-hans.Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Englan: 英国爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可
zh-hans.Brereton, Cheshire, Eng: 英国英格兰爾布雷雷頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Bosley于大约1290年出生在英国爾波斯利时，她的父亲Sir Richard Bosley28岁，母亲Lady Jane Pulford23岁。她于1318年与William Brereton在英国爾布雷雷頓 姆 斯維其可结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1360年在英国英格兰爾保斯托享年71岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bosley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Boseley in Westbury on Severn, Gloucestershire, probably named with the Old English personal name Bōsa + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
English: habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Bosley, from the Old English personal name Bōsa or Bōt + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Boseley .
Americanized form of French   Beausoleil  , especially in New England. Compare   Boseley  .

variants.name: Boseley
meanings: Americanized form of French   Beausoleil  . Compare   Bosley  .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Bosley was born about 1290, in Bosley, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir Richard Bosley, was 28 and her mother, Lady Jane Pulford, was 23. She married William Brereton in 1318, in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1360, in Bostock, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 71.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Bosley est née environ 1290, à Bosley, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Bosley, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Lady Jane Pulford, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé William Brereton en 1318, à Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1360, à Bostock, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 71 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Bosley um 1290 in Bosley, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Bosley 28 und ihre Mutter Lady Jane Pulford 23. Sie hat 1318 in Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England William Brereton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1360 im Alter von 71 Jahren in Bostock, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Bosley è nata il circa 1290 nel Bosley, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard Bosley, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Lady Jane Pulford, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato William Brereton nel 1318, nel Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1360, nel Bostock, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 71 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Bosleyが約1290年にイギリスチェシュアイアボスリーで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Bosleyは28歳，母Lady Jane Pulfordは23歳であった。1318年にイギリスチェシュアイアブレレトン クウム スメスウィックでWilliam Breretonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1360年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアボストックで71歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Bosley(이)가 대략 1290년 영국 체실르 보슬리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Bosley(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Jane Pulford(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1318년 영국 체실르 브레레턴 c 스멧h윅에서 William Brereton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 보스톡에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Bosley nasceu aproximadamente 1290, em Bosley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Bosley, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Lady Jane Pulford, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com William Brereton em 1318, em Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1360, em Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 71 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Bosley родилась около 1290 г. в местности босли, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Bosley было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Jane Pulford, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Brereton в 1318 г. в местности бриретон кум сметвикк, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1360 г. в местности бостокк, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 71 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Bosley nació aproximadamente 1290, en Bosley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Bosley, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Lady Jane Pulford, tenía 23 años. Se casó con William Brereton en 1318, en Brereton cum Smethwick, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1360, en Bostock, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 71 años.
